items.scenario: You have been renting a studio apartment for four months. Recently, the bathroom ceiling started leaking every time your upstairs neighbor showers, and mold has begun forming near the vent fan. You already reported it to the building's maintenance line once, but nothing has changed.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Sokolov. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the leak and where the mold has appeared.
Explain why you're concerned about the mold spreading.
Suggest sending someone to inspect the vent this week.
items.subject: Mold and leaking ceiling in my bathroom

items.scenario: You recently started a part-time job as a receptionist at a veterinary clinic. Your manager asked you to redesign the walk-in intake form, but the deadline is only two days away and you still have client calls to handle every afternoon.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Bianchi. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain your current workload and time constraints.
Ask whether the deadline could be extended.
Suggest splitting the task with another receptionist.
items.subject: Extra time needed for the new intake form

items.scenario: You've coordinated a weekly neighborhood cleanup program for the past year. The city recently cut the program's supply budget in half, so volunteers are now expected to bring their own gloves and trash bags. Several volunteers have told you this is discouraging new people from joining.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Ianelli. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how the budget cut is affecting volunteer turnout.
Describe what supplies volunteers are now missing.
Suggest an alternative way to fund the supplies.
items.subject: Budget cuts affecting our neighborhood cleanup program

items.scenario: You ordered a smart thermostat online two weeks ago for your apartment. Recently, the device stopped connecting to the mobile app, even after you reset it twice following the manual's instructions. The company's online support chat has not responded to your messages in three days.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Okonkwo. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain what has gone wrong with the thermostat's app connection.
Mention the troubleshooting steps you have already tried.
Ask what options exist for a replacement or refund.
items.subject: Thermostat app won't stay connected
